title: Software Engineer
description:
Software Engineer (Full-time, Contract)

Location: Singapore (Cleantech area – on-site)

About the Role

We are hiring a skilled and driven Software Engineer with strong hands-on experience in C#, ASP.NET, Python, and Angular, plus a solid foundation in Microservices and DevOps. You’ll work in a collaborative R&D environment where innovation meets real-world software delivery, building solutions that support advanced digital manufacturing initiatives.

Key Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and deliver software solutions using C#, ASP.NET, Python, and Angular.
  • Collaborate with technical stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable software architectures.
  • Build and maintain microservices for reliable, modular, and high-performing systems.
  • Integrate cross-platform software components, services, and APIs.
  • Implement and improve CI/CD pipelines using DevOps best practices (e.g., Jenkins, Bitbucket).
  • Evaluate and prototype emerging technologies to enhance development workflows and solution quality.
  • Debug, troubleshoot, and optimize systems for performance, stability, and maintainability.

Requirements

  • Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or a related discipline.
  • Solid experience developing with C#, ASP.NET, Python, and Angular.
  • Proven experience with microservices, Docker, and Kubernetes.
  • Proficiency with DevOps/CI-CD tools (e.g., Jenkins, Bitbucket pipelines).
  • Familiarity with Agile/Scrum delivery practices.
  • Strong problem-solving skills with the ability to work effectively in a team environment.

Preferred / Nice-to-Have

  • Knowledge of networking and cybersecurity in industrial environments.
  • Exposure to data analytics, AI/ML in applied/industrial use cases.
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms and integrating cloud services into enterprise systems.


How to Apply: Interested applicants, please click on the “Apply Now” to submit your updated resume.  

Please note: Due to the anticipated high volume of applications, only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All information provided will be treated with strict confidentiality and used solely for recruitment purposes.

Ahmad Ilyas bin Azhari

Consultant – IT & Digital

EA Personnel No: R24123184

Peoplebank Singapore Pte Ltd | EA Licence No: 08C5248

postedCompany.description:
PEOPLEBANK SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.


Peoplebank is Asia Pacific's leading talent solutions provider with a network of offices in Singapore, Hong Kong and Australia. Peoplebank provides one-stop recruitment and staffing solution services across multiple industry sectors covering contract and permanent hires, and payroll services. With a dedicated team of specialist consultants, we deliver several innovative candidate sourcing strategies, retention strategies, and operating best practices to provide excellence in our service levels for both our clients and candidates.
